blended.narrative: Plattekill Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 4,927 ft. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tuesday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 53°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 3.7" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
